page.title: PitchForge - AI Sales Lead Conversion Tool

hero.title: Know what to say in every customer follow-up
hero.description: Capture customer context and generate follow-up language you can actually use. Forge every lead into a better sales opportunity.

generator.title: Generate this follow-up
generator.description: Turn the customer’s current situation into natural sales language
generator.empty: Add the customer context, then generate a follow-up.
generator.tip: Edit, rewrite, or save the result after generation
generator.sample_focus: Rear-seat space and daily commuting cost
generator.initial_script: Hi Emma, I wanted to follow up on the Model Y. You previously focused on rear-seat space and daily commuting cost. Are those still the most important points in your decision? We can compare the practical space, relevant trim, and long-term ownership cost against how you will actually use the car. Would later today or tomorrow work better for a quick conversation?

features.title: From customer context to the next useful conversation
features.description: Keep scattered lead details, communication priorities, and reusable language in one clear workflow.

items.title: Customer profiles
items.description: Keep the vehicle, budget, stage, priorities, and main concerns together.

items.title: Context-aware generation
items.description: Generate structured follow-up based on stage, channel, and communication tone.

items.title: Edit and rewrite
items.description: Refine the full script directly or ask for a shorter, gentler, or more direct version.

items.title: Communication records
items.description: Save confirmed language as a record so you can review every customer follow-up.

items.title: Saved scripts
items.description: Keep polished language and reuse it in similar customer situations.

items.title: Language and theme
items.description: Switch between Chinese and English, light and dark, with preferences remembered.

workflow.label: A clear workflow
workflow.title: Four steps to a better follow-up
workflow.description: Spend less energy composing on the spot and more attention on the customer’s next step.

items.title: Create the customer
items.description: Start with a name, vehicle, and budget. Complete the profile over time.

items.title: Add the context
items.description: Choose stage, channel, priorities, concerns, and communication tone.

items.title: Generate and refine
items.description: Get a complete follow-up, then edit or rewrite it with specific guidance.

items.title: Use and retain
items.description: Copy when needed, save confirmed communication as a record, and keep strong versions as saved scripts.

scenarios.title: Built for common automotive follow-up situations
scenarios.description: The language changes with the customer stage, so every lead does not receive the same generic message.

items.title: First lead contact
items.description: Open naturally and confirm the real need without pushing too early.

items.title: Ongoing follow-up
items.description: Continue from the last discussion, address concerns, and maintain a useful rhythm.

items.title: Visit invitation
items.description: Clarify what to experience and offer concrete time options that are easy to answer.

items.title: Plan and price discussion
items.description: Compare fit, trim, and ownership cost without making unverified promises.

items.title: Customer pauses
items.description: Respect the customer’s timing and keep space for a future conversation.

items.title: After the sale
items.description: Confirm delivery details and ongoing service to keep the experience continuous.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.description: How PitchForge works and where your information is kept.

items.question: Who is PitchForge for?
items.answer: It is designed for automotive sales advisors, store teams, and sales managers who follow customer leads over time.

items.question: Can I edit generated language?
items.answer: Yes. Edit the full script directly, rewrite it, or add guidance for a new version.

items.question: Where is customer information saved?
items.answer: Customer profiles, communication records, and saved scripts remain in your current browser so you can continue later.

items.question: Do saved scripts affect new generation?
items.answer: No. Saved scripts are an independent personal library and are only used when you choose one for a customer.

items.question: Is the interface available in English?
items.answer: Yes. PitchForge supports Chinese and English, plus light, dark, and system theme modes.

cta.title: Be better prepared for the next customer follow-up
cta.description: Start with one lead, organize the priorities, and create language you can use.
